mapper.select:
/* grpInsrMapper.getGrpInsrMgmtList */
SELECT A.SEQ , A.GRP_INSR_NM , A.STRT_DT , A.END_DT , A.INSR_NM , A.USG_YN , FN_GET_USRNM(A.REGST_ID) AS REGST_NM , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DT , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RVISN_DT FROM MSP_GRP_INSR_MST A WHERE #{stdrDt} BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT
AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'
AND INSTR(A.INSR_CD, #{grpInsrCd}) > 1
/* grpInsrMapper.getGrpInsrYn */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_GRP_INSR_MST A WHERE NVL(#{reqInDay}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'
